summary: All features verified working. Backend (13/13 tests passed): Onboarding checklist 7 steps, update step, merin code APIs, invite link generation, license projections, 346+ AI models from OpenRouter. Frontend: Login works, Admin bypasses onboarding gate, Profile page has Merin code input (data-testid='profile-merin-code-input'), Admin Settings > Security tab has Onboarding Gate toggle (data-testid='onboarding-gate-toggle'), AI Training page shows dynamic model selector with 346 models.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 172 tested the onboarding gate system. Key endpoints: GET /api/onboarding/checklist (7 steps), PUT /api/onboarding/checklist/step, PUT /api/onboarding/merin-code, GET /api/onboarding/invite-link. Profile page has merin_referral_code field. Admin Settings > Security tab has 'Onboarding Gate' toggle. Admin (master_admin/super_admin) always bypasses the gate. AI Training page shows 346+ models from OpenRouter. onboarding_gate_enabled setting may not appear in DB until admin saves settings.

onboarding_checklist_7_steps.notes: GET /api/onboarding/checklist returns 7 steps with completion status

frontend_admin_bypass_gate.notes: Admin bypasses onboarding gate, sees dashboard

frontend_profile_merin_input.notes: Merin Referral Code input found on Profile page with data-testid='profile-merin-code-input'

frontend_security_onboarding_toggle.notes: Admin Settings > Security has Onboarding Gate toggle with data-testid='onboarding-gate-toggle'

frontend_ai_training_models.notes: AI Training page shows 346 models from OpenRouter with dynamic selector

onboarding_gate_system.7_step_checklist: Verified - heartbeat_registered, merin_registered, hub_registered (auto), exchange_verified, tutorials_completed, live_trade_scheduled, rewards_onboarded
onboarding_gate_system.merin_referral_code: Verified - stored in user profile, used in invite links
onboarding_gate_system.admin_toggle: Verified - Platform Settings > Security > 'Enable Onboarding Gate'
